text: Bitcoin is holding near $59.5K with marginal losses while Ethereum shows slight strength at $1,587, suggesting cautious consolidation rather than directional conviction in the majors. Extreme fear sentiment (15/100) and declining dominance at 55.6% indicate investors are rotating toward altcoins like Solana (+3%), a typical risk-on signal despite the fearful mood. Volume at $82B is moderate, and the 7-day fear decline suggests some stabilization, though the low absolute level reflects genuine uncertainty in the market.
